M1334_STUS_PRBLM_STAS_ULCR M1334 Status of Most Problematic Stasis Ulcer This field indicates the status of the most problematic (observable) stasis ulcer. 01 = Fully granulating
02 = Early/partial granulation
03 = Not healing CHAR 2 x x x x x x
M1340_SRGCL_WND_PRSNT M1340 Does This Patient Have A Surgical Wound This field indicates whether the patient has a surgical wound. 00 = No
